context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the setup-environment instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use the setup-environment skill only for tasks that match its documented trigger and scope.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Follow the skill-specific workflow and gates instead of giving generic Rails advice.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Produce concrete artifacts requested by the task in English unless another language is explicitly requested.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Call out assumptions, constraints, and verification steps that matter for the task.
